1000681522.english: The Iron Bugs are on the move. It looks like they will attack the defense line again soon.
1000681522.korean: 철충들이 움직이고 있군요. 곧 다시 방어선을 공격해 올 것 같습니다.

1000681523.english: Please go down below the barricade, Master. Sister Constancia is waiting down there.
1000681523.korean: 바리케이드 아래로 내려가시지요, 주인님. 아래에서 콘스탄챠 언니께서 기다리고 계십니다.

1000681525.english: … Then, the 33rd Defense of Camelot… will commence.

1000681526.english: - Going back in time, a few days ago, the Ark.

1000681527.english: Despite having eliminated the link within Britain, the British Iron Bug acted in perfect order, as if under some kind of command.
1000681527.korean: - 영국 내의 연결체를 제거했음에도 불구하고, 영국의 철충들은 뭔가의 지휘를 받는 듯 일사불란하게 행동했다.

1000681528.english: The attacks on Camelot did not stop, and the Iron Bug steadily depleted our defensive capabilities by deploying troops piecemeal, just as Moriarty had done.
1000681528.korean: - 카멜롯에 대한 공격은 멈추지 않았고, 철충들은 모리아티가 그랬듯 병력을 축차투입하며 우리의 방어 능력을 착실히 소모시켰다.

1000681530.english: Yeah… that’s true, and that behavior pattern… it’s so much like Moriarty.
1000681530.korean: 응… 그것도 그렇고, 저 행동 양식… 너무 모리아티를 닮았어.

1000681531.english: It's more than that. You could say that being that annoying is practically Moriarty himself.
1000681531.korean: 그 이상이지. 저 정도로 짜증나는 건 거의 모리아티 그 자체라고 해도 될 정도야.

1000681532.english: I've fought Moriarty a lot, you know? I've fought him for roughly ten years. So I know just how much the Iron Bug's movements change when he's around versus when he's not.
1000681532.korean: 난 모리아티랑 많이 싸워봤잖아? 대충 십 년 가까이 싸웠단 말이지. 그래서 녀석이 있을 때랑 없을 때 철충들의 움직임이 얼마나 달라지는지는 알고 있어.

1000681533.english: That level of detailed movement is impossible unless he is commanding it personally.
1000681533.korean: 저 정도로 세밀한 움직임은 놈이 직접 지휘하는 게 아니라면 불가능한 수준이야.

1000681534.english: … That’s right. I actually came here to talk about that issue, but I see you were both already here.
1000681534.korean: …맞아. 안 그래도 그 문제로 할 말이 있어서 찾아왔는데, 이미 둘 다 모여 있었구나.

1000681535.english: Can you both come to the lab for a moment? I have something to show you.
1000681535.korean: 잠깐 둘 다 실험실로 와 볼래? 보여줄 게 있어.

1000681536.english: So, what do you want to show me?

1000681537.english: You know how I got my hands on the Trickster's corpse before? So, I compared the Moriarty corpse I obtained this time with the Trickster's corpse, and…
1000681537.korean: 예전에 트릭스터의 시체를 손에 넣은 적이 있잖아? 그래서, 이번에 손에 넣은 모리아티의 시체와 트릭스터의 시체를 비교해 봤는데…

1000681538.english: This Moriarty has an underdeveloped central nervous system compared to existing tricksters. Furthermore, there is one more strange thing.
1000681538.korean: 이 모리아티는 기존의 트릭스터에 비해 중추신경계 발달이 부족해. 게다가, 이상한 점이 한 가지 더 있어.

1000681539.english: The degree of fusion between Moriarty's body and Alterium is very low. Considering the affinity between the Iron Bug body and Alterium, the fusion should be much better than this, right? However, when analyzing the microstructural structure, the Iron Bug body and Alterium failed to properly combine, forming a boundary like this…
1000681539.korean: 모리아티의 신체랑 알터리움의 융합정도가 많이 낮아. 철충 신체와 알터리움의 친화성을 생각하면 이보다 더 융합이 잘 되어야하거든? 그런데 미세 조직 구조를 분석하면 이렇게 철충의 몸체와 알터리움이 제대로 결합하지 못해서 경계를 이루고 있는…

1000681541.english: Moriarty isn't a complete individual yet. It probably hasn't even been a year since things turned out this way.
1000681541.korean: 모리아티는 아직 완전한 개체가 아니란 말이야. 아마 이렇게 된 지 일 년이 되지 않았을 거야.

1000681544.english: Doesn't that sound a bit strange? They say it hasn't even been a year since it was made.
1000681544.korean: 방금 그 말, 뭔가 이상하지 않아? 만들어진 뒤로 채 일 년도 안 지났다잖아.

1000681545.english: Moriarty and I have been fighting for years.
1000681545.korean: 모리아티랑 나는 몇 년 동안 싸워 왔단 말이야.

1000681546.english: There were two Tricksters, too. They didn't need to resemble me in this annoying way.
1000681546.korean: - 트릭스터도 두 놈이었지. 이렇게 짜증나는 점까지 닮을 필요는 없었는데.

1000681547.english: - Then does that mean there could be dozens more Moriartys in England… It looks like things are going to get bigger than I thought.
1000681547.korean: - 그렇다면, 모리아티가 영국에 수십 마리는 더 있을 수도 있다는 이야기인가… 아무래도 내 생각보다 일이 더 커질 것 같은데.

1000681549.english: Do you remember the glass container Moriarty was carrying on his back? What was inside was liquid Alterium.
1000681549.korean: 모리아티가 등에 짊어지고 있던 유리 용기 기억나지? 거기 들어 있던 건 액화 알터리움이야.

1000681550.english: It contains a massive amount of Alterium... and to refine liquid Alterium of this quantity and high purity, it requires not only the Alterium itself but also a considerable amount of energy.
1000681550.korean: 그 안에는 엄청난 양의 알터리움이 들어가 있고… 이 정도의 양과 순도가 높은 액화 알터리움을 정제하기 위해서는 알터리움도 알터리움이지만 적잖은 에너지가 필요해.

1000681551.english: If you substitute the pre-collapse UK marginal and actual energy output data into this equation, and then calculate by including the predicted post-collapse infrastructure changes and other energy indicators…
1000681551.korean: 이 방정식에 멸망 전 영국의 한계 에너지 산출량과 실질 에너지 산출량 데이터를 대입한 다음, 멸망 후 인프라 변화 예측도와 기타 에너지 지표를 포함시켜서 계산하면…

1000681553.english: It’s not very likely that there are dozens of Moriartys. Including the one we caught, there are probably two, or at most three.
1000681553.korean: 모리아티가 몇십 마리 정도 있을 가능성은 그리 높지 않아. 우리가 잡은 녀석까지 해서 둘, 많아봐야 셋 정도 되겠지.

1000681554.english: So, does that mean if we take care of all those guys, Britain will be a Moriarty-free zone for the time being?
1000681554.korean: 그렇다면 그 놈들을 전부 처리하면, 영국은 당분간 모리아티 프리 존이 된다는 얘기구나?

1000681555.english: That'll probably happen, right? But it won't be easy. Since one of them got taken down, he'll be extremely cautious, so the chances of him showing up again probably aren't very high.
1000681555.korean: 그렇게 되겠지? 하지만, 쉽지는 않을 거야. 한 녀석이 당했으니까 놈도 극도로 신중해질 테고, 아마 다시 모습을 드러낼 가능성은 그리 높지 않을 거야.

1000681556.english: Hmm... generally speaking, that's the case.

1000681557.english: I may not know anything else, but I have an uncanny grasp of Moriarty's personality.
1000681557.korean: 내가 다른 건 몰라도, 모리아티의 성격 하나는 기가 막히게 파악하고 있거든?

1000681558.english: Iron Bug... no, I mean, at least in the field of Moriarty psychology, he's good enough to be called a doctor.
1000681558.korean: 철충... 아니, 적어도 모리아티 심리학 쪽에서는 박사라고 해도 될 정도라는 말이지.

1000681559.english: From my perspective, Moriarty is a guy who treats his subordinates thoroughly as expendable. Furthermore, he has absolutely no trust in them.
1000681559.korean: 그런 내가 봤을 때, 모리아티는 부하들을 철저하게 소모품으로 대하는 녀석이야. 게다가, 부하들에 대한 믿음도 전혀 없어.

1000681560.english: I'm saying that I'm the type of person who only feels satisfied when I finish everything with my own hands... no, with my own toenails.
1000681560.korean: 모든 일을 자기 손… 아니, 자기 발톱으로 마무리 지어야 속이 풀리는 성격이란 얘기야.

1000681561.english: That is certainly true. The way we broke through the second line of defense was also by pushing all the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) into one spot to divert our attention there, and then...
1000681561.korean: 확실히 그렇긴 해. 2차 방어선을 돌파한 방법도, 철충을 한 곳에 있는 대로 밀어 넣어서 우리 주의를 그 쪽으로 돌린 다음...

1000681562.english: Because in the meantime, they concentrated their attacks on the weak points of the defensive wall and broke through the line. It seems like the statement that they view the Iron Bug as expendables is an accurate description.
1000681562.korean: 그 사이 방어벽의 취약한 부분을 집중적으로 공략해서 방어선을 돌파했으니까. 철충을 소모품으로 본다는 말이 정확한 표현 같아.

1000681563.english: And I think it's true that he handles everything himself. Actually, if you think about what happened last time, he didn't really need to come into Camelot himself, did he?
1000681563.korean: 그리고 자기가 모든 일을 처리한다는 말도 맞는 것 같아. 사실 저번 일을 잘 생각해보면, 자기가 직접 카멜롯 안으로 들어올 필요는 없었잖아?

1000681564.english: Just as Merlin said, he probably stormed into Camelot to make sure he finished things off.
1000681564.korean: 멀린 언니의 말대로, 자기가 확실하게 마무리를 짓기 위해서 카멜롯 안으로 돌입한 거겠지.

1000681565.english: - ...Looking back, the Trickster's true form was the same. Even in the past, he confused us by going so far as to use himself as bait.
1000681565.korean: - ...돌이켜 본다면, 트릭스터 본체도 그랬다. 과거에도 녀석은 자기 자신을 미끼로 쓰면서까지 우리를 교란했으니까.

1000681566.english: It must just be that he has a personality that tries to control every situation himself.
1000681566.korean: - 그만큼 자기 자신이 모든 상황을 통제하려는 성격을 가진 것이겠지.

1000681567.english: So, if you throw a bait tasty enough to hook him, he will definitely show himself to take it.
1000681567.korean: 그러니까, 놈이 낚일 정도로 맛있는 미끼를 던진다면, 놈은 분명히 그 미끼를 물기 위해 모습을 드러낼 거야.

1000681568.english: I just came up with a plan. I'll need to flesh out the details with Leanne, but... I need Arthur's full cooperation. Can you help?
1000681568.korean: 방금 내가 계획을 하나 세웠는데, 자세한 건 리앤이랑 같이 좀 구체화를 시켜야겠지만... 아서의 전폭적인 협조가 필요해. 도와줄 수 있을까?

1000681570.english: Didn't I tell you? It's bait the enemy has no choice but to bite.
1000681570.korean: 내가 말했잖아? 적이 물 수밖에 없는 미끼라고.

1000681571.english: Of course I have to use Arthur as bait. Hehehe...

1000681572.english: Merlin had a truly terribly evil expression when he said those words.
1000681572.korean: - …그 말을 할 때의 멀린은 정말 끔찍할 정도로 사악한 표정이었다.

1000681573.english: - Ugh, just thinking about that expression gives me goosebumps...
1000681573.korean: - 으으, 그 표정을 떠올리니 아직도 소름이 돋을 정도다…

1000681574.english: Master! The defense line has been breached!

1000681575.english: The Iron Bug forces are all pouring in... and everyone is heading to Camelot right now under Laviata's command!
1000681575.korean: 철충 병력이 전부 밀려들어오고 있고... 지금 라비아타 언니의 지휘 아래에 다들 카멜롯으로 가고 있어요!

1000681576.english: Wow, that's faster than I expected. Is it because it's the original? His command ability was better than I imagined.
1000681576.korean: - 이런, 예상보다 빠른데. 원본이라 그런가, 녀석의 지휘 능력이 내 상상보다 더 뛰어났다.

1000681577.english: Just a moment… I’ll check the progress.

1000681578.english: … They say it will be finished in a few minutes.

1000681580.english: And… how should we handle the operation? Should we proceed according to plan?
1000681580.korean: 그리고… 작전은 어떻게 할까요? 계획대로 진행할까요?

1000681581.english: - Good. There are a few variables, but so far, everything is going according to plan. So…
1000681581.korean: - 좋아. 좀 변수가 있지만, 아직까지는 계획대로 돌아가고 있다. 그러니…

1000681582.english: If I'm going to play the role of bait anyway, I might as well do it properly.
1000681582.korean: - 기왕 미끼 역할을 할 거라면 제대로 해야겠지.

1000681583.english: ...It’s so bad you can’t even see the ground. It seems like everything I step on is covered in Iron Bugs.
1000681583.korean: ...땅이 안 보일 정도네요. 발 닿는 곳은 전부 철충으로 뒤덮인 것 같아요.

1000681584.english: Will Moriarty really act according to our plan?

1000681585.english: Master, I think the Iron Bug has breached the barricade on the first floor.
1000681585.korean: 주인님, 철충이 1층 바리케이드를 돌파한 것 같아요.

1000681586.english: The upload speed is slower than I expected.

1000681587.english: It's a makeshift barricade, so there's no reason it should take that long... I wonder what they're plotting?
1000681587.korean: 급조한 바리케이드라서 그렇게 오래 걸릴 이유가 없는데… 뭘 꾸미는 걸까요?

1000681590.english: To be more precise, I provoked that. I deliberately walked along the castle walls for several days, exposing myself to make my presence clearly known.
1000681590.korean: - 보다 정확히 말하자면, 내가 그렇게 유도했다. 내 존재를 확실히 인식시키기 위해서, 며칠 동안 계속 일부러 성벽 위를 걸으며 내 모습을 노출시켰으니까.

1000681591.english: That is why I am staying here. To lure him toward me.
1000681591.korean: - 그래서 내가 여기에 남아있는 것이다. 놈을 내 쪽으로 유도하기 위해서.

1000681592.english: Master, I've finished all the preparations!

1000681593.english: You can retreat at any time. Just say the word!
1000681593.korean: 언제든지 후퇴할 수 있답니다. 말씀만 하세요!

1000681595.english: We will begin preparations to evacuate the Prydwen and the Orca from Portsmouth.
1000681595.korean: 프리드웬과 오르카 호, 포츠머스에서 철수할 준비를 시작하겠습니다.

1000681596.english: Moriarty is cunning and intelligent. He can quickly identify weaknesses in our defenses and send his main forces to the most vulnerable spots to break through the line.
1000681596.korean: 모리아티는 교활하고 지능적이야. 우리 방어선의 약점을 금세 파악하고, 가장 취약한 곳으로 주 병력을 보내 방어선을 돌파할 수 있을 정도로.

1000681597.english: So, Captain Lilith's bodyguard has to deliberately run around the top of the castle walls and block dozens of sniper shots...
1000681597.korean: 그래서 일부러 성벽 위를 돌면서, 리리스 경호대장이 수십 번의 저격을 막아내야 하고...

1000681598.english: ...I must make sure Ms. Laviata clearly recognizes her combat power.

1000681599.english: That way, he will go to extreme lengths to separate Watson from the two of them.
1000681599.korean: 그래야 놈이 왓슨을 그 둘에게서 떼어놓기 위해 무리한 짓을 저지를 테니까.

1000681600.english: Of course, this is a strategy that can only be used if Moriarty is as smart as we think...
1000681600.korean: 물론, 이건 모리아티가 우리 생각만큼 똑똑해야만 쓸 수 있는 전략이지만...

1000681601.english: I think Moriarty will do at least that much.
1000681601.korean: 난 모리아티가 그 정도는 해 줄 거라고 생각해.

1000681603.english: Could it be that they are trying to blow up Camelot?

1000681604.english: In that case, the most likely one is...

1000681605.english: I suppose they are blocking the view and launching a surprise attack.

1000681607.english: This probably isn't all. Considering the combat prowess President Laviata demonstrated in the night battle...
1000681607.korean: 이게 다가 아닐 거예요. 라비아타 통령이 야간 전투에서 보여준 전투력을 생각하면...

1000681608.english: ...Oh wait, the Chief of Security didn't use that title. Ahem, let me repeat that.
1000681608.korean: ...아차, 경호대장은 이런 호칭을 쓰지 않았죠. 흠흠, 다시 말할게요.

1000681609.english: Considering the combat prowess Laviata showed in the night battle...
1000681609.korean: 라비아타 언니가 야간 전투에서 보여준 전투력을 생각하면...

1000681610.english: This is probably an attempt to blind us. The real story is likely on the other side.
1000681610.korean: 이건 우리 눈을 가리려는 시도겠죠. 진짜는 다른 쪽일 거예요.

1000681611.english: Ah, I see. Now I think I understand your intentions to some extent, brother.
1000681611.korean: 아, 그렇구나. 이제 저도 오라버니의 노림수가 뭔지 어느 정도 알 것 같아요.

1000681612.english: So, the reason you've been sending Ms. Laviata here and there to exterminate the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) all this time was to make them clearly realize Ms. Laviata's combat power, right?
1000681612.korean: 오라버니가 그 동안 라비아타 씨를 여기저기 파견해서 철충들을 섬멸한 건, 녀석들에게 라비아타 씨의 전투력을 확실히 인식시키기 위한 거였군요?

1000681613.english: And, even though Ms. Laviata's combat power is tremendous, I made sure they realized for sure that aerial combat is impossible...
1000681613.korean: 그리고, 라비아타 씨의 전투력이 어마어마하긴 해도, 공중전은 불가능하다는 걸 녀석들에게 확실히 인식시켰으니까...

1000681614.english: They'll probably smash the floor we're standing on, right?
1000681614.korean: 녀석들은 아마 저희가 서 있는 바닥을 부수겠죠?

1000681615.english: With a loud bang, the floor shattered, and we began to fall downward, and downward.
1000681615.korean: - 폭음과 함께, 바닥이 부서지며 우리는 아래로, 또 아래로 추락하기 시작했다.

1000681616.english: And, kicking off the collapsing floor, Moriarty lunged at me.
1000681616.korean: - 그리고, 무너지는 바닥을 박차고 모리아티가 내게 달려들었다.

1000681617.english: As if recreating the scene of Sherlock Holmes and Moriarty falling at Reichenbach Falls, we kept falling down to the underground of Camelot.
1000681617.korean: - 마치 라이헨바흐 폭포에서 셜록 홈즈와 모리아티가 추락하는 장면을 재현하듯, 우리는 카멜롯의 지하까지 계속 떨어졌다.

1000681618.english: Moriarty's claws, having approached me using the Iron Bugs as a stepping stone, eventually pierced my heart...
1000681618.korean: - 철충들을 발판 삼아 내게 접근한 모리아티의 손톱이, 결국 내 가슴을 꿰뚫었고...

1000681619.english: - ...At the same time, the hologram that Makina was remotely controlling crackled and vanished.
1000681619.korean: - ...동시에 마키나가 원격으로 조종하던 홀로그램이 지직거리며 사라졌다.

1000681620.english: Oh dear, you pierced right through the holographic drone.

1000681621.english: He must have realized by now that the Commander is a hologram, too.
1000681621.korean: 녀석도 이제 사령관님이 홀로그램이라는 걸 알아차렸을 거예요.

1000681622.english: However, I confirmed that Moriarty and the Iron Bugs also followed the hologram and fell underground.
1000681622.korean: 하지만, 모리아티와 철충들도 홀로그램을 따라서 지하로 떨어지는 걸 확인했어요.

1000681623.english: The underground is quite deep, so you won't be able to get out of there.
1000681623.korean: 지하가 상당히 깊으니, 거기서 빠져나올 수는 없을 거예요.

1000681624.english: - Okay... then now there is only one thing left.
1000681624.korean: - 좋아... 그럼 이제 남은 건 단 하나.

1000681626.english: Fortunately, now that the operation has progressed this far, there is no need to worry about the assassination of Moriarty failing.
1000681626.korean: - 다행히, 작전이 여기까지 진행된 이상, 모리아티 암살이 실패할 걱정은 없다.

1000681627.english: Because I have placed my best paddles in the Camelot basement.
1000681627.korean: - 카멜롯 지하에는 현재 내가 가진 최고의 패들을 배치해 두었으니까.

1000681628.english: I hear a loud bang. The plan worked out perfectly.
1000681628.korean: 폭음이 들려오네요. 계획이 잘 맞아 떨어졌군요.

1000681629.english: never imagined things would go exactly according to plan up to this point.
1000681629.korean: 설마 여기까지 계획대로 척척 진행될 줄은 몰랐는데.

1000681630.english: After all, it is an operation devised by Merlin, Ms. Leanne, and even the Commander putting their heads together.
1000681630.korean: 멀린과 리앤 씨, 거기에 사령관까지 함께 머리를 맞대고 세운 작전이니까요.

1000681631.english: It would have been a bit troublesome if Moriarty were the type to run wild without reason...
1000681631.korean: 모리아티가 이성이 없이 날뛰는 타입이라면 좀 곤란했겠지만...

1000681632.english: Since the enemy was cunning and devised schemes, I think I was actually able to anticipate their actions.
1000681632.korean: 교활하게 계략을 세우는 적이었기에, 오히려 행동을 예상할 수 있던 것 같아요.

1000681633.english: As expected, it is perfect, just like the plan devised by the Master!

1000681635.english: Moriarty will never be able to get out of here alive.
1000681635.korean: 모리아티는 절대로 살아서 여길 나갈 수 없을 거란다.

1000681636.english: - A few days ago, the helpers Merlin brought.

1000681638.english: You know what I plan to do, right, Arthur?
1000681638.korean: 내가 뭘 하려고 하는지 알겠지, 아서?

1000681639.english: Yes. You're not really sending me back to Portsmouth, are you?
1000681639.korean: 그럼. 설마 내가 아서를 진짜로 포츠머스로 다시 돌려보내겠어?

1000681640.english: Arthur can stay here in this comfortable ark and play with the others.
1000681640.korean: 아서는 이 편안한 방주에서 다른 애들이랑 놀고 있으면 된다는 말씀.

1000681641.english: I've already heard about Merlin's plan…
1000681641.korean: 멀린 씨의 계획에 대해서는 이미 설명을 들었고...

1000681642.english: If Mery and I combine our efforts, we can create a hologram so perfect that even the armored bugs would be fooled.
1000681642.korean: 메리와 제가 힘을 합친다면, 철충도 속아넘어갈 정도로 완벽한 홀로그램을 만들어 낼 수 있을 거예요.

1000681643.english: Of course, there's one drawback. The hologram doesn't have a physical form…
1000681643.korean: 물론, 한 가지 단점이 있어요. 홀로그램이 정말 물리적 실체를 가진 건 아니라서...

1000681644.english: If it's attacked by the armored bugs, nothing will happen, and they might realize it's just a hologram.
1000681644.korean: 철충의 공격에 당할 경우 아무런 일도 일어나지 않을 테고, 홀로그램이라는 사실을 들킬 거라는 점이죠.

1000681646.english: Lilith will guard the hologram as if protecting you, Commander.
1000681646.korean: 리리스가 마치 주인님을 지키듯 홀로그램을 경호할 테니까요.

1000681647.english: The attacks will only target the hologram modeled after you. But…
1000681647.korean: 공격받는 건 어디까지나 주인님의 모습을 본 딴 홀로그램. 하지만...

1000681648.english: Just imagining you being attacked would be heartbreakingly painful for Lilith…
1000681648.korean: 주인님이 공격받아서 다치는 모습을 상상하는 것만으로도, 리리스는 가슴이 찢어질 듯 아플 거예요...

1000681649.english: …So you can imagine how shocked she'd be if someone suggested using you as bait.
1000681649.korean: ...그러니 주인님을 미끼로 쓰자는 말을 듣고 리리스가 얼마나 놀랐을지 아시겠지요?

1000681650.english: …So we need to make sure that link is properly handled!
1000681650.korean: ...그, 그러니 그럴 일이 없도록, 연결체 하나를 확실히 처리하자는 얘기지!

1000681651.english: Anyway, I'll discuss the detailed plan with Rian and then let you know! That's it for now!
1000681651.korean: 아무튼, 그럼, 자세한 계획은 리앤이랑 내가 상의하고 나서 알려줄게! 그럼 이만!

1000681652.english: …That moment was truly terrifying. The way their eyes darkened completely…

1000681653.english: …I seriously thought I was going to die.

1000681654.english: Well… that's true, but doesn't that make it more impactful? If this were a comic, there'd be a "BOOM!" sound effect right there, and "TO BE CONTINUED…" flashing on the screen.
1000681654.korean: 그건... 그렇지만, 그게 더 임팩트가 있잖아! 만화였으면 그 장면에서 쿠쿵! 하고 효과음도 들어갔을 걸? 투 비 컨티뉴... 하고 자막도 뜨고.

1000681655.english: Anyway, now that Moriarty has fallen… this button… I can press it, right, Arthur?
1000681655.korean: 아무튼, 모리아티가 쓰러진 걸 확인했으니까... 이 버튼... 눌러도 되지, 아서?

1000681656.english: I've been shaking my fingers wanting to press this big red button ever since!
1000681656.korean: 나 지금 아까부터 이 크고 빨간 버튼을 누르고 싶어서 손가락이 막 부들대고 있었거든?

1000681658.english: Please! Let me press it just once!

1000681659.english: Ah! I was about to press it!

1000681660.english: So mean, Arthur! Stealing the best part for yourself! Hey? That's cheating!
1000681660.korean: 치사해, 아서! 제일 맛있는 부분만 뺏어가는 게 어딨어! 어? 이거 반칙이야!

1000681661.english: That's like taking the strawberry off the top of the cake!
1000681661.korean: 이건 케이크 위에 있는 딸기를 뺏어가는 거랑 비슷한 정도로 나쁜 거라고!

1000681662.english: - …Merlin's right. That's basically stealing the most delicious part of the cake.
1000681662.korean: - ...멀린의 말이 맞다. 이건 케이크의 가장 맛있는 부분만 빼앗아 먹는 것과 다름없는 짓이다.

1000681663.english: - But even so, no one can resist the temptation of a big red button.
1000681663.korean: - 하지만... 그렇다고는 해도, 크고 빨간 버튼의 유혹을 참을 수 있는 사람은 없는 법.

1000681664.english: - So if the button isn't pressed before I do it, isn't that Merlin's fault for holding back?
1000681664.korean: - 결국 내가 버튼을 누르기 전에 버튼을 안 누른 멀린의 잘못이 아닐까?

1000681665.english: Uuuugh! Just wait! I'll get my revenge later!
1000681665.korean: 으으으으! 두고 보자! 나중에 꼭 복수해 줄 테다!

1000681666.english: Wait a second! I thought of a cool line. Let me say my closing line… ahem…
1000681666.korean: 잠깐만! 나 멋있는 말 생각났어. 마무리 대사 좀 할게. 흠흠....

1000681667.english: Thus… I have become death, the destroyer of worlds.
1000681667.korean: 이것으로... 나는 죽음이자, 세계의 파괴자가 되었도다.

1000681668.english: - Sounds familiar… Should we call a city guard for plagiarizing a famous quote?
1000681668.korean: - 어디서 많이 들어본 말 같은데... 명언을 표절한 죄로 시티가드를 불러야 하나?

1000681669.english: Ah, I was just trying to look cool!
1000681669.korean: 아잇, 모처럼 폼 좀 잡나 했는데!

1000681670.english: …Anyway… now you get it, right? I would never make a scheme that would put Arthur in danger!
1000681670.korean: ...뭐, 아무튼... 이제 잘 알겠지? 내가 아서가 위험해지는 계책을 세울 리가 없다는 걸!

1000681671.english: Now, this is truly the end, Moriarty! And all your armored bugs!
1000681671.korean: 그럼, 이제 진짜로 끝이다, 모리아티! 그리고 휘하 철충들!

1000681672.english: Block the Camelot exit! Begin overloading the power plant!
1000681672.korean: 카멜롯 출구 차단! 발전소 과부하 개시!

1000681674.english: - And as if Merlin's voice served as a signal…
1000681674.korean: - 그리고, 멀린의 목소리가 신호가 되기라도 한 듯...

1000681675.english: - Camelot's power plant exploded in a blinding flash of light.
1000681675.korean: - 카멜롯의 발전소가 눈부신 빛을 내며 폭발했다.

1000681676.english: Everyone got out safely, right? Headcount complete?
1000681676.korean: 다들 빠져나오신 거 맞죠? 인원 확인은 끝났나요?

1000681679.english: Then everyone, put on your safety gear. Even though the distance is safe, viewing the explosion directly can cause blindness.
1000681679.korean: 그럼, 다들 안전장비를 착용하세요. 안전거리는 확보했지만 폭발을 직접보면 실명할 위험이 있으니까요.

1000681680.english: Ah, then I can watch, right?

1000681681.english: Anyway, I can't see, so I'm not exactly a "Blind Princess," am I?
1000681681.korean: 어차피 저는 앞을 볼 수 없으니까요. 블라인드 블라인드 프린세스가 될 수는 없잖아요?

1000681682.english: Ahaha, that was a funny little joke… I should use it later.
1000681682.korean: 아핫, 방금 이거 좀 재밌는 농담이었네요. 나중에 써먹어야지...

1000681684.english: So… everyone, put on your safety gear!

1000681685.english: Phew, even from this distance… it's still so bright.
1000681685.korean: 휴, 거리가 꽤 떨어져 있는데도... 이렇게 밝을 줄이야.

1000681687.english: According to Merlin, it was enough to obliterate both Portsmouth and Camelot.
1000681687.korean: 멀린의 말로는 포츠머스와 카멜롯을 전부 날려버릴 정도라고 하더군요.

1000681689.english: Yes. You can rest easy now.

1000681690.english: You must be tired, so take a proper rest aboard the ark.
1000681690.korean: 그 동안 피곤하셨을 텐데, 방주에서 푹 쉬세요.

1000681691.english: Yes… I need to rest and not think of anything for a while.
1000681691.korean: 네... 당분간은 아무런 생각도 하지 말고, 푹 쉬어야겠어요.

1000681692.english: ... just solve one little concern before I do.

1000681694.english: Anyway, I finished reconnaissance across England and returned!
1000681694.korean: 아무튼, 영국 전역 정찰 끝내고 돌아왔어!

1000681695.english: Really? Then can I sleep here for a bit after reporting? Just sleep… really.
1000681695.korean: 정말? 그럼 나 보고 끝나고 여기서 좀 자다 가도 돼? 다른 게 아니라, 진짜 잠만.

1000681696.english: …The blanket's been washed but isn't dry yet. Ugh…

1000681697.english: Hehe, then report quickly and get some rest.
1000681697.korean: 히히, 그럼 빨리 보고하고 좀 쉬어야지.

1000681698.english: I think Moriarty was just the two of them. The armored bugs across England are all out of control now.
1000681698.korean: 모리아티는 두 마리가 전부였던 것 같아. 영국 전역의 철충들이 전부 통제를 잃은 상태야.

1000681699.english: Because Moriarty gathered the surrounding bugs, the air defenses aren't as terrifying as before. Reconnaissance was much easier than last time.
1000681699.korean: 모리아티가 주변 철충을 싹싹 긁어모아서 데려온 덕분에, 방공망도 이전만큼 무시무시하지는 않더라. 예전보다 훨씬 더 정찰이 쉬웠어.

1000681700.english: Of course, there are still some remaining armored bugs…
1000681700.korean: 물론, 그래도 남은 철충은 아직 많긴 하지만...

1000681701.english: Yeah. They won't come out of the tunnels, and even if they do, they won't swarm in organized groups like before.
1000681701.korean: 응. 터널로 철충이 나올 일도 없고, 나오더라도 이전처럼 조직적으로 몰려오진 못할 거야.

1000681702.english: Then… I'm really going to sleep now.

1000681703.english: - Watching Sleipnir jump onto the bed, I sank deep into the chair.
1000681703.korean: - 슬레이프니르가 침대로 뛰어드는 걸 보며, 나는 의자에 깊숙이 몸을 파묻었다.

1000681704.english: - This whole situation was quite exhausting for me too. I had to stay up all night for a week to command the defense of Camelot.
1000681704.korean: - 이번 일은 내게도 꽤나 지치는 일이었다. 일주일 동안 밤을 꼬박 새면서 카멜롯 수성전을 지휘해야 했으니까.

1000681705.english: - So, I should get some sleep and prepare for the next battle.
1000681705.korean: - 그러니, 나도 한 숨 자고 일어나서 다음 싸움을 준비해야겠지.

1000681706.english: - The fight for Europe against Lemonade Delta.
1000681706.korean: - 유럽을 놓고 벌어질, 레모네이드 델타와의 싸움을.

1000681708.english: ...Surely, this isn't about asking me to turn off the lights again because you're going to sleep, right?
1000681708.korean: ...설마 이번에도 잘 거니까 불 좀 꺼 달라는 얘기는 아니겠지?

1000681710.english: It's not in the list of downloadable games.
1000681710.korean: 다운로드 가능한 게임 목록에는 안 보이는데.

1000681712.english: Interesting. So, do we just need to talk then?
1000681712.korean: 특이하네. 그럼 그냥 말만 하면 되는 거야?

1000681713.english: But why all of a sudden are we doing this?
1000681713.korean: 그런데, 갑자기 이건 왜 하자고 하는 거야?

1000681714.english: That makes sense. But why suddenly is Blind Princess involved?
1000681714.korean: 그럴 만도 하네. 그런데, 갑자기 블라인드 프린세스는 왜?

1000681716.english: No, let's just give it a try. So, are all the members here?
1000681716.korean: 아냐, 한 번 해보지 뭐. 그럼, 멤버는 다 모인 거야?

1000681717.english: This is supposed to be like a board game, right?

1000681719.english: Oh, oh. I slept well, of course.
1000681719.korean: 어, 어어. 나야 뭐 잘 잤지.

1000681720.english: We're here now, but we haven't even ordered yet, isn't it pointless to wait?
1000681720.korean: 우린 이제 와서 아직 주문도 안 했는데, 괜히 기다리는 거 아니야?

1000681721.english: I was planning to eat at the restaurant while guiding Merlin there.
1000681721.korean: 멀린한테 식당을 안내해주는 김에 식당에서 먹으려고 했지.

1000681722.english: You've really lived a hard life.

1000681723.english: ...Wait, you ordered the B set. That sausage isn't mine, is it?
1000681723.korean: ...잠깐, 너 B 세트 시켰잖아. 그 소시지 내 거 아니야?

1000681724.english: Why bother? I can just take some from Merlin.
1000681724.korean: 뭘 그럴 것 까지야. 멀린 거 뺏어먹으면 되지.

1000681725.english: Hmm, the bacon is really good too.

1000681726.english: That's good. Oh, by the way...

1000681729.english: Oh, how is that supposed to work?

1000681731.english: A knife and a water container.

1000681732.english: Of course, working is the best.

1000681736.english: ...A warmonger is fine, but an assassin?

1000681737.english: Why am I the only one who can't move, and it's a bag?
1000681737.korean: 아니, 왜 나만 움직이지도 못하는 가방이야?

1000681739.english: Hmm... If you insist that much... maybe I'll try it.
1000681739.korean: 흐음... 그, 그렇게까지 말한다면... 한 번 해 볼까?

1000681744.english: ...Just talk freely, it won't be reflected in the story.
1000681744.korean: ...그냥 말은 자유롭게 할 테니까, 스토리에는 반영이 안 되는 걸로 하자.

1000681745.english: You said you're a sage who knows everything!

1000681748.english: Hmm, I honestly can't be sure about that either...
1000681748.korean: 으음, 그게... 솔직히 나도 확신을 할 수가 없네...

1000681752.english: That's terrifying... no, wait. It's just the neighborhood hill of our kingdom, right?
1000681752.korean: 그것 참 무시무시... 아니, 잠깐만. 그냥 우리 왕국 동네 뒷산이란 말이잖아?

1000681754.english: ...Wait, why is there a dragon's nest on the neighborhood hill?
1000681754.korean: ...아니, 동네 뒷산에 왜 용의 둥지가 있어?

1000681757.english: We shouldn't have messed with it in the first place.

1000681759.english: ...Let's find the crown! At this point, we grab the crown and run!
1000681759.korean: ...왕관을 찾자! 이렇게 된 이상, 왕관을 손에 넣고 도망치는 거야!

1000681762.english: No way, a teaser for part 2 here?!

1000681763.english: Come in. Don't stand outside with sore legs.
1000681763.korean: 들어와. 다리 아프게 밖에서 서 있지 말고.

1000681764.english: Holy Maiden, what brings you to this humble room?
1000681764.korean: 성녀님이 이 누추한 방을 무슨 일로 방문하셨죠?

1000681765.english: Then it wouldn't be a surprise event, right?

1000681766.english: I was just about to say that too.
1000681766.korean: 나도 마침 그 말을 하려고 했지.

1000681767.english: I just saw her running somewhere in a hurry.

1000681768.korean: 글쎄... 표정이 겁에 질린 것 같은 표정이던데.

1000681771.english: So, what was making you gloomy these days after all?
1000681771.korean: 그래서, 요즘 침울해 있던 건 결국 뭐 때문이었어?

1000681772.english: Can I ask what the question was?

1000681773.english: ...So, did you find the answer to your question?

1000681775.english: ...Wait, do you want to go somewhere together?

1000681776.english: I want to show you something.

1000681777.english: Can you tell me what the answer is?

1000681778.english: You don't have to make such a request.

1000681780.english: ...12 floors? No, what does that even mean right now...

1000681781.english: Is it okay if we go slowly?

1000681782.english: What kind of story will it be? Romance? Or comedy?
1000681782.korean: 어떤 이야기가 되려나? 로맨스? 아니면 코미디?

1000681783.english: ...Just how many factories did Black River build anyway?
1000681783.korean: ...블랙리버에서 대체 얼마나 공장을 많이 지어놓은 건지.

1000681784.english: Yeah, we need to prepare in case of unexpected situations.
1000681784.korean: 응, 아무래도 돌발 상황이 벌어졌을 경우를 대비해야 하니까.

1000681785.english: I'll try harder next time, next time.

1000681786.english: Orca-ho will return in the afternoon; do you want to go back then?
1000681786.korean: 오후에 오르카 호가 다시 돌아오는데, 그 때 돌아갈래?

1000681787.english: That's not possible. Friedwen will need at least a few more hours to move.
1000681787.korean: 그건 안 돼. 프리드웬이 움직이려면 적어도 몇 시간은 더 필요하니까.

1000681788.english: Then I'll ask you. Don't forget to retreat immediately when I send the signal.
1000681788.korean: 그럼, 부탁할게. 신호 보내면 바로 퇴각하는 거 잊지 말고.

1000681789.english: That's true. I didn't expect such precise movements.
1000681789.korean: 확실히 그렇긴 하지. 저 정도로 정교한 움직임을 보일 줄은 몰랐는데.

1000681790.english: Did the Metal Parasites learn Moriarty's tactics?

1000681796.english: Of course. What do you need?

1000681798.english: How's the progress on the tech division?

1000681799.english: It can't be helped. Constantia, take the other members and board Friedwen.
1000681799.korean: 어쩔 수 없지. 콘스탄챠는 다른 대원들을 데리고 프리드웬에 탑승해 줘.

1000681800.english: Yes. Put everyone except ‘Lyris' and ‘Labiata' on Friedwen.
1000681800.korean: 응. ‘리리스’와 ‘라비아타’를 제외한 나머지 인원 전부 프리드웬에 태워.

1000681801.english: Probably. As long as he behaves as we expect, surely that will happen.
1000681801.korean: 아마도. 녀석이 우리 예상대로 행동하는 이상, 분명 그럴 거야.

1000681802.english: Well, we have some expectations, but for now, let's observe the situation.
1000681802.korean: 글쎄, 어느 정도 예상은 하고 있지만... 일단은 상황을 좀 지켜보자.

1000681803.korean: 그럼... 지금 바로 후퇴 준비 시작해.

1000681804.english: No, probably not. He'll want to finish it with his own hands...
1000681804.korean: 아니, 아마 그러진 않을 거야. 자기 손으로 끝을 내고 싶어 할 테니...

1000681806.english: You're trying to implement me as a hologram?

1000681808.english: ...I think it's your fault for not explaining properly.
1000681808.korean: ...제대로 설명을 안 한 네 잘못이라고 생각하는데.

1000681809.english: I can't resist a big red button.

1000681810.english: Good job. You must be tired going back and forth to Europe on the ark, so rest well.
1000681810.korean: 고생했어.  방주에 유럽까지 왔다갔다하느라 지쳤을 텐데, 푹 쉬어.

1000681812.english: Oh well... then sleep here for a bit before you go.
1000681812.korean: 저런... 그럼 여기서 좀 자다가 가.

1000681813.english: That's fine. At least the rear won't be in danger when fighting Delta.
1000681813.korean: 그 정도면 괜찮아. 적어도 델타와 싸울 때 후방이 위험해질 일은 없는 거니까.

1000681817.english: Of course, working is the best.

1000681818.english: Press it. We have to finish this.

1000681819.english: How big of a deal is it?

1000681822.english: Of course, working is the best.

1000681824.english: Heh heh, as expected, Arthur has also fallen head over heels for my charm, hasn't he? Well, it's only natural that you'd fall for me, the super-genius beautiful girl villain. But, actually, I've been in love with Arthur since he saved me. Hehe, I love you too, Arthur.
1000681824.korean: 후후, 역시 아서도 내 매력에 푹 빠져버렸구나?​ 뭐, 초천재미소녀대악당인 나한테 반하는 거야 당연한 일이지.​ 근데, 사실 난 아서가 날 구해줬을 때부터 이미 아서한테 반해 있었어.​ 히힛, 나도 사랑해, 아서.

1000681828.english: Substation neutralized. Can blackout at any time.
1000681828.korean: 변전소 제압완료. 언제든지 블랙아웃 시킬 수 있어.

1000681829.english: Neutralized too early. Wait two days.

1000681830.english: According to the forecast, a cold wave will strike in two days.
1000681830.korean: 예보에 따르자면 이틀 뒤에 한파가 몰아친다고 하네요.

1000681831.english: If the substation is paralyzed then, it will be fatal.

1000681832.english: Lea and Titania are tied here to change the weather…
1000681832.korean: 레아와 티타니아가 기상을 변화시킨다고 여기에 묶이던가…

1000681833.english: Or leave many people to freeze to death while restoring without weather changes… Sam-an will have to choose one of the two.
1000681833.korean: 기상 변화하지 않고 복구하는 동안 많은 사람들이 얼어죽게 내버려두던가… 삼안은 양자택일 해야겠죠.

1000681836.english: This lady we're escorting this time… do we really have to escort her?
1000681836.korean: 이번에 우리가 호위하는 그 아줌마… 정말로 호위해야 해?

1000681837.english: I saw the news, and all it shows is people criticizing her.
1000681837.korean: 뉴스 봤는데 그 아줌마 욕하는 뉴스 밖에 없어.

1000681838.english: That she killed her husbands to get inheritance and insurance money, that she used that money to harass weak people and companies, that she enslaved humans…
1000681838.korean: 남편들 죽여서 유산이랑 보험금 탔다거나, 그 돈으로 힘없는 사람들이랑 기업들 괴롭혔다던가, 인간들을 노예로 부린다던가…

1000681839.english: Tomo. Can I take that as insubordination?
1000681839.korean: 토모. 그 말 항명으로 받아들여도 되겠나요?

1000681841.english: No matter how much of a bastard that bastard is, he's our bastard.
1000681841.korean: 그 개새끼가 아무리 개새끼더라도 우리 개새끼에요.

1000681842.english: So shut up and focus on the mission.

1000681844.english: Good work. The next target is set, so after one day of adaptation training, proceed immediately to the next mission.
1000681844.korean: 수고했어요. 다음 목표가 정해졌으니 하루 적응 훈련 후에 곧장 다음 임무를 수행하세요.

1000681845.english: This ring was acquired during this mission… can you dispose of it for me?
1000681845.korean: 이번 임무 중에 획득한 반지인데… 나 대신 처분해 줄래요?

1000681851.english: There are two bombs with identified locations right now.
1000681851.korean: 지금 위치가 특정된 폭탄은 두 개에요.

1000681852.english: One is directly under the VIP room.

1000681853.english: The other is at the main gate.

1000681855.english: Why are you asking something so obvious?

1000681856.english: Start with the one near the VIP room.

1000681857.english: Then at least other students can be evacuated—

1000681858.english: If I were the terrorist, I would have detonated everything the moment I saw signs of evacuation.
1000681858.korean: 제가 테러범이었으면 대피시키는 낌새가 보이자마자 전부 터트렸을 거예요.

1000681863.english: Now that I'm free, I guess my mind is just full of random thoughts.

1000681870.english: It's a rescue request on a civilian radio channel, seems to have been mixed in during intel gathering.
1000681870.korean: 민간 무선 채널에 올라온 구조요청인데, 정보수집 중에 섞여 들어온 거 같아.

1000681871.english: We'll need to apply a filter.

1000681872.english: No, do that later. Information can be acquired from unexpected places.
1000681872.korean: 아뇨, 그건 나중에 해요. 정보는 예상하지 못한 곳에서 습득할 수 있으니까요.

1000681873.english: No response from the company or government?

1000681874.english: None. All communication was sent to upper agencies and all located 080 branches, but not a single one replied.
1000681874.korean: 없어. 상부기관은 물론이고 위치가 특정된 080지부 전부에 통신을 보냈지만 회신한 곳은 한 곳도 없어.

1000681875.english: If it were only humans, you could assume it's due to Hypnose disease, but even unmanned branches with only Bioroids didn't respond…
1000681875.korean: 인간들뿐이라면 휩노스병때문이라고 추론할 수 있지만 우리처럼 바이오로이드만 있는 무인 지부에도 회신이 없다니…

1000681876.english: Are they deliberately silent? Or is there some reason…
1000681876.korean: 일부러 침묵하는 건지. 아니면 무슨 이유가 있어서 그런 건지…

1000681878.english: It's too early for us to act independently.

1000681881.english: How much supplies are left at the base?

1000681883.english: If not continuously supplied, we'll run out.

1000681884.english: Wasn't there enough? How much do we actually have right now?
1000681884.korean: 충분히 있지 않았나요? 지금 당장 있는 건 얼마나 되죠?

1000681887.english: ……You really have the luxury to joke, huh.

1000681888.english: Haha, well. In a world like this, composure and wit are important.
1000681888.korean: 하하, 뭐. 이런 세상일수록 여유와 위트는 중요하잖아.

1000681889.english: A ball full of air bursts quickly.
1000681889.korean: 공기가 가득 찬 공은 금방 터져버리니까.

1000681891.english: But as Shirayuri said, if we pile all the materials in one place, won't it be hard to find later?
1000681891.korean: 그런데 시라유리가 말한 것처럼 자료를 한 곳으로 몰아넣으면 나중에 찾기 힘들어지지 않아?

1000681892.english: Right now, it's more important to create available space and reduce consumption of supplies.
1000681892.korean: 지금은 가용공간을 만들어서 물자의 소비를 줄이는 게 더 중요해요.

1000681893.english: Spare air conditioners can be used as backups, and important data is already remembered by me and the Doctor.
1000681893.korean: 남는 공조기를 예비로 쓸 수 있고, 중요한 자료는 이미 저와 닥터가 기억하고 있죠.

1000681894.english: And in case of emergency, destroying data is easy too.
1000681894.korean: 그리고 만일의 경우에 자료를 파기하는 것도 쉽고요.

1000681895.english: You're talking so hard it sounds like an excuse…
1000681895.korean: 너무 열심히 말해서 변명하는 거 같은데…

1000681897.english: Next, help Nikki Tracey organize the warehouse.
1000681897.korean: 다음은 니키 트레이시를 도와서 창고 정리를 하세요.

1000681899.english: The hazardous material map around the base is complete.

1000681900.english: Compared to before, the radius has increased by 20 meters.

1000681901.english: How about the frequency and routes of the Bioroid attacks?

1000681902.english: Recently, Bioroid activity around the base has not been observed.
1000681902.korean: 최근 거점 주위의 철충의 활동이 관찰되지 않고 있어요.

1000681903.english: Looks like our branch is no longer attractive to the Bioroids.
1000681903.korean: 철충들에게 우리 지부는 더 이상 매력적이지 않나 보네요.

1000681904.english: A little bruising to the ego, huh.

1000681905.english: If you want, I can assign a reconnaissance mission.

1000681906.english: So, it means it's safe for now?

1000681908.english: None. Probably the company, government, and other branches… all wiped out.
1000681908.korean: 없어. 아마 회사도, 정부도, 다른 지부도… 다 전멸한 거 같아.

1000681912.english: Are there any survivors? If so, respond!
1000681912.korean: 살--- 분 계신가요? 있-- 응답 바랍니다!

1000681913.english: We cannot withstand the Bioroid attacks any longer—requesting rescue!

1000681918.english: How long has it been since the higher-ups didn't reply?
1000681918.korean: 상부에서 회신이 안 온지 얼마나 되었죠?

1000681920.english: No, knowing this much is enough.

1000681923.english: Doctor. Play back the restored communication.

1000681925.english: Are there any survivors? If so, respond!
1000681925.korean: 살아있는 분 계신가요? 있다면 응답 바랍니다!

1000681926.english: We cannot withstand the Bioroid attacks any longer! Requesting rescue!
1000681926.korean: 철충의 공격을 더 이상 버틸 수 없습니다! 구조바랍니다!

1000681929.english: This is the rescue request we just received.

1000681930.english: As of now, we're going to secure the survivors.
1000681930.korean: 우리는 현 시간부로 생존자들을 확보하러 갈 거예요.

1000681931.english: Wait. Shirayuri. Going to rescue them?

1000681933.english: Putting the wordplay aside, what benefit do we have?
1000681933.korean: 말장난이라는 건 둘째치고 우리한테 무슨 이득이 있는데?

1000681934.english: Since it's Adam Jones Laboratory, we can get supplies, equipment, or information not found elsewhere. Maybe our commanding officer could even be there.
1000681934.korean: 애덤 존스 연구소니까 여기에 없는 물자나 장비, 정보를 얻을 수 있겠죠. 어쩌면 우리들의 명령권자가 있을 수도 있고요.

1000681935.english: If the lab's condition is better than here, we could secure that place.
1000681935.korean: 연구소의 상태가 여기보다 좋다면 그곳을 확보할 수도 있겠죠.

1000681936.english: We don't have the authority to operate independently.

1000681938.english: According to regulations, if contact with higher-ups is lost, independent operations are allowed.
1000681938.korean: 내규에 따르면 상부기관과의 연락이 되지 않으면 독자적인 활동이 가능해요.

1000681939.english: Doctor, how long has it been since contact with headquarters was lost?
1000681939.korean: 닥터, 상부와 연락이 끊긴 지 얼마나 되었죠?

1000681940.english: ……No matter what I say, you'll go. I don't intend to oppose for the sake of opposing.
1000681940.korean: ……내가 뭐라고 말해도 갈 거잖아. 반대를 위한 반대를 할 생각은 없어.

1000681942.english: Good. Even if you said you'd follow, I was going to stop you.

1000681943.english: You don't belong on the field.

1000681945.english: First, transmit information about the destination.

1000681946.english: Other agents, prepare according to the information.
1000681946.korean: 다른 요원들은 정보에 따른 준비를 하세요.

1000681949.english: Wasn't it the voice of a friend we met at UOU Academy?
1000681949.korean: 우리 UOU학원 다닐 때 만난 친구 목소리였지?

1000681951.english: Even if it was, it doesn't matter to us.

1000681954.english: I went through a lot of trouble.

1000681959.english: Ha… haha… no need to say that.

1000681960.english: We might need to detour. The bridges on the route are fine, but there are many Bioroids in front and behind the bridges, so we could get surrounded.

1000681961.english: According to the data, there are bridges both upstream and downstream…
1000681961.korean: 우회해야 할 거 같아. 경로상의 다리 상태는 괜찮은데. 다리 앞뒤로 철충이 많아서 자칫하면 포위될 수도 있어.

1000681962.korean: 데이터상으로는 상류, 하류 둘 다 다리가 있는데…

1000681963.english: Which is better, upstream or downstream?

1000681964.english: ……There's a dock downstream, so even if the bridge can't be used, we can cross by boat.
1000681964.korean: 상류, 하류 어느 쪽이 더 적합한가요?

1000681965.korean: ……하류에 선착장이 있어서 다리를 못 써도 배로 도하할 수 있어.

1000681968.english: Well… at least there's a boat.

1000681969.korean: 뭐… 배가 있다는 것에 의의를 두죠.

1000681971.english: But there are many Bioroids around.

1000681972.english: Fortunately, the main gate hasn't been breached… but in other words, getting in ourselves will be difficult.

1000681973.english: The lab is physically disconnected from the internal network, so hacking from here is impossible.
1000681973.korean: 다행히 정문은 안 뚫렸지만… 바꿔 말하면 우리도 들어가려면 고생을 해야겠네요.

1000681974.english: And in that state, the probability of survivors is even lower.
1000681974.korean: 연구소가 내부망과 물리적으로 단절되어 있어서 여기서는 해킹하는 게 불가능해.

1000681975.korean: 그리고 저 상태라면 생존자가 없을 확률이 더 높아.

1000681976.english: If we're not sure, it's our job to check.

1000681977.english: Shirayuri isn't stupid, so saying more is meaningless.
1000681977.korean: 확실하지 않다면 확인하는 것도 우리가 할 일이에요.

1000681978.english: We'll send the floor plan, equipment layout, and hacking tools via terminal.
1000681978.korean: 시라유리도 바보는 아니니까 이 이상 말해도 무의미하겠지.

1000681979.korean: 단말기로 평면도랑 설비도, 해킹툴 보낼 게.

1000681981.english: Please wait here for a moment.

1000681984.english: Judging by the surrounding craters and debris, it's probably not military equipment, just homemade bombs used as mines.
1000681984.korean: 그렇지 않겠어요? 주위의 크레이터랑 파편을 보면 군용품이 아니라 사제폭탄을 지뢰로 쓴 거겠죠.

1000681986.english: Shirayuri. What should we do about this?

1000681988.english: Exact analysis requires equipment, but judging by the corrosion on the components, it's probably been about a year.
1000681988.korean: 정확한 분석은 장비가 있어야하지만 구성품의 부식정도를 보면 1년 정도 됐을 거예요.

1000681990.english: The detonator is crude, but the explosive itself is high-purity. It was probably synthesized in the lab. With a proper detonator, it can be used.
1000681990.korean: 뇌관은 조잡하지만 폭약자체는 고순도 폭약이네요. 아마 연구실에서 합성하지 않았나 싶어요. 제대로 된 뇌관만 있으면 쓸 수 있어요.

1000681991.english: Then let's take it just in case.

1000681992.english: We're entering Bioroid influence now, so don't relax.
1000681992.korean: 이제 철충 영향권에 들어가니 긴장을 늦추지 마세요.

1000681993.english: We'll hold a brief operation meeting here.

1000681994.english: The main gate is too wide and could let Bioroids in, so exclude it.
1000681994.korean: 정문은 너무 넓어서 철충이 침입할 위험이 있으니 제외.

1000681995.english: There's an access point on the left side of the lab for movement between research buildings. Enter through here.
1000681995.korean: 여기 연구소 좌측면에 연구동 간의 이동을 위한 출입구가 있어요. 이곳으로 진입.

1000681996.english: Should we send a signal that there are survivors inside the lab?

1000681997.english: No. While there's a possibility of cooperation from inside, if the survivors move clumsily, it could allow Bioroid intrusion.
1000681997.korean: 아뇨. 내부에서 협조해줄 가능성도 있지만 생존자들이 어설프게 움직였다가 철충의 침입을 허용할 위험이 있어요.

1000681998.english: Amy, monitor the access point from a visible location and provide cover.
1000681998.korean: 에이미는 출입로가 보이는 곳에서 출입로를 감시하면서 엄호하세요.

1000682001.english: Use the equipment layout sent by Doctor to infiltrate the lab and take control of the central control room. The AI is likely managing it, but with hacking tools, there won't be a problem.
1000682001.korean: 닥터가 보내 준 설비도를 보고 연구소에 침입해서 중앙 제어실을 장악해주세요. 아마 AI가 관리하고 있겠지만 해킹툴이 있으면 문제 없을 거예요.

1000682003.english: If it's already taken over by Bioroids, anything further is meaningless. Withdraw. But if the number is small, proceed even if it requires some risk.
1000682003.korean: 이미 철충에게 장악되었다면 이 이상은 무의미하겠죠. 철수. 하지만 그 수가 적다면 조금 무리해서라도 속행해주세요.

1000682004.english: Even if something happens, it'll only cost you.
1000682004.korean: 만약에 문제가 생겨도 당신 하나만 잃고 끝나겠죠.

1000682005.english: Haha! Don't underestimate a top-class agent.
1000682005.korean: 하하! 특급 요원을 너무 얕잡아 보는 거 아냐?

1000682006.english: I'll take out everything in sight and return, so don't worry.
1000682006.korean: 보이는 족족 때려눕히고 돌아올 테니까 걱정말라고.

1000682007.english: Tomo and Ellie will enter with me. Search for and secure survivors.
1000682007.korean: 토모와 엘리는 저와 함께 진입. 생존자들을 수색하고 확보.

1000682009.english: If not, let's proceed quickly since we don't know when the Bioroids will strike again.
1000682009.korean: 없다면 철충이 언제 다시 공세를 취할지 모르니 빠르게 진행하죠.

1000682010.english: This is Nikki. Arrived at the central control room. Just hacked the system with hacking tools.
1000682010.korean: 여기는 니키. 중앙 제어실에 도착. 지금 막 해킹툴로 시스템을 해킹했어.

1000682011.english: Understood. I'll open the access point when I give the signal.
1000682011.korean: 알겠어요. 제가 신호를 하면 출입구를 열어주세요.

1000682012.english: Amy, stay here and report external conditions.

1000682014.english: We've entered. Close the door, Nikki.

1000682015.english: Shall we split up to search?

1000682016.english: No. Move together to be safe.

1000682018.english: No major changes. There's ongoing destruction outside, but the main research building has held so far, so we have a bit more leeway.
1000682018.korean: 큰 변화는 없어요. 외부 시설에 대한 지속적인 파괴행위는 있지만 본연구동은 지금까지 버틴 것을 보면 좀 더 여유가 있을 것 같네요.

1000682020.english: Good. Then we'll focus on searching.

1000682021.english: Looking at the layout… the living quarters are likely on the inner side.
1000682021.korean: 도면을 보면… 거주구는 안쪽에 있을 확률이 높겠네요.

1000682027.english: Let's check just in case. Nikki, mark the location.
1000682027.korean: 혹시 모르니 확인해보죠. 니키, 위치를 표시해주세요.

1000682028.english: Location confirmed. Lead: Tomo. Middle: Ellie. Rear: Me.
1000682028.korean: 위치 확인. 선두에는 토모. 중간에는 엘리. 후방에는 제가.

1000682029.english: Ellie, detect for booby traps while moving.
1000682029.korean: 엘리는 이동 중에 부비트랩이 있는지 감지하세요.

1000682030.english: Bioroids could have infiltrated, so stay alert.
1000682030.korean: 철충이 침입했을 가능성도 있으니 경계를 늦추지 마세요.

1000682032.english: Don't rush! It could be a booby trap!

1000682035.english: Here too. There too. There are many survivors!

1000682037.english: Since there's no response, is it Hypnose disease…

1000682041.english: Whoa! If you sleep here, your ‘eyes' go crazy, sir!

1000682052.english: All… immobilized due to Hypnose disease.

1000682057.english: Being merely alive doesn't make them survivors.
1000682057.korean: 살아만 있는 걸 생존자라고 하지 않아.

1000682058.english: Doctor. Is there a good way to move them?
1000682058.korean: 닥터. 이들을 옮길 좋은 방법이 없나요?

1000682059.english: Then I'll propose a simple and definite solution.

1000682061.english: I asked how to move them.

1000682062.english: How can five people move so many?
1000682062.korean: 그 많은 인원을 단 5명이서 어떻게 옮기려고?

1000682064.english: Recognizing the problem is the start of solving it.

1000682065.english: Five people on site and one far away have to move 172 people, practically corpses, through Bioroid swarms.
1000682065.korean: 현장에 있는 5명과 먼 곳에 있는 1명이서 송장이나 마찬가지인 172명을 철충 무리를 뚫고 옮겨야 해.

1000682066.english: If the lab had equipment to get through this swarm, they would have already escaped.
1000682066.korean: 연구소에 이 철충무리를 뚫을 장비가 있었다면 이미 탈출했겠지.

1000682067.english: Even our branch's equipment can't solve this.

1000682068.english: Shall we call a god? Any preferred religion? If not, a Titan?
1000682068.korean: 신이라도 불러올까? 선호하는 종교는 있어? 없으면 타이탄이라도?

1000682069.english: I requested you, Doctor, not a god.
1000682069.korean: 저는 신이 아니라 닥터 당신에게 요청했어요.

1000682070.english: I'm not a god. How am I supposed to save everyone in this situation?
1000682070.korean: 나는 신이 아니야. 이런 상황에서 어떻게 모두를 구하라고?

1000682071.english: Do you have no idea what's happening? Do I really have to explain it?
1000682071.korean: 지금 어떤 상황인지 전혀 인식을 못하는 거야? 꼭 내가 말을 해줘야해?

1000682072.english: No matter how stubborn you are, you can't save them.
1000682072.korean: 아무리 고집을 부려도 그 사람들 못 구해.

1000682073.english: Fine, suppose we somehow handle this impossible situation.
1000682073.korean: 아니, 이 불가능한 상황을 어떻게 타개했다고 쳐.

1000682074.english: Even then, those people won't wake up and will die.
1000682074.korean: 그래봤자 그 사람들 깨어나지도 못하고 죽어.

1000682075.english: It's impossible and meaningless. Why risk your life for this?
1000682075.korean: 불가능하고 무의미하다고. 왜 이런 짓에 목숨을 거는 건데?

1000682078.english: They seem to be going on the offensive! Prepare!

1000682081.english: The full offensive still seems far off…
1000682081.korean: 본격적인 공세는 아직 먼 거 같은데…

1000682082.english: If we retreat now, we might manage to escape somehow.
1000682082.korean: 지금이라도 철수하면 어떻게든 빠져나갈 수 있을 거 같아.

1000682084.english: I said I'm continuing the operation now.

1000682086.english: Niki, connect the lab's internal network to the outside so I can control it.
1000682086.korean: 니키, 내가 조종할 수 있게 연구소 내부망을 외부와 연결시켜.

1000682088.english: Amy, keep monitoring the overall Bioroid movements and any Bioroids in camera blind spots.
1000682088.korean: 에이미, 철충의 전체적인 움직임과 카메라의 사각지대에 있는 철충의 움직임을 계속 보고하세요.

1000682089.english: Niki, follow the Doctor's orders to manage the central control room and prevent Bioroid intrusion. If blocking is difficult, destroy the AI core to prevent the Bioroids from taking control of the lab.
1000682089.korean: 니키, 닥터의 지시에 따라 중앙 제어실을 관리하면서 철충이 침입하는 것을 막으세요. 막기 힘들면 AI코어를 파괴해서 철충에게 연구소의 관리권이 넘어가는 것을 막으세요.

1000682090.english: Ellie, gather the weapons and explosives inside the lab. Also, set explosives at key points so you can trigger booby traps and block passageways.
1000682090.korean: 엘리, 연구소 내부에 있는 무기나 폭발물을 모아주세요. 그리고 요소마다 부비트랩과 통로를 발파할 수 있게 화약을 설치하세요.

1000682091.english: Tomo, move survivors with me to a location easier to defend.
1000682091.korean: 토모는 저와 함께 생존자들을 방어하기 용이한 곳으로 옮겨요.

1000682096.english: The lab is completely surrounded by Bioroids.

1000682097.english: Not only from all sides… but even from the air.

1000682099.english: Oh, as expected from Sam-An. They really built a solid lab.
1000682099.korean: 오오, 역시 삼안. 연구소 하나는 잘 지었다니까.

1000682100.english: If it had been built slightly more defensively, it could have served as a fortress.
1000682100.korean: 조금만 더 방어에 용이하게 지었으면 요새로 써도 무방했겠어.

1000682101.english: Well… either way, there weren't enough defensive forces, so it wouldn't have mattered.
1000682101.korean: 뭐… 그래봤자 방어 병력이 부족해서 어쩔 수 없었겠지만 말이야.

1000682102.english: This is Niki. The outer wall has been breached. Lock all doors and lower all barriers. But watch out for intrusion through vents and such.
1000682102.korean: 여기는 니키. 외벽이 뚫렸어. 모든 문 잠그고 차단벽 전부 내려놓을 게. 하지만 환풍구 같은 곳으로 침입할 위험이 있으니 주의해.

1000682103.english: Niki, can you lure the Bioroids to the locations I marked?
1000682103.korean: 니키 언니. 철충들을 제가 표시한 곳으로 유도해줄 수 있나요?

1000682106.english: Haha, better be careful not to get on our lady's bad side.
1000682106.korean: 하하, 우리 아가씨한테 밉보이지 않게 조심해야겠네.

1000682107.english: A bomb disposal expert is also an explosives expert.
1000682107.korean: 폭탄 해체 전문가는 폭탄 전문가이기도 하니까요.

1000682108.english: And nobles fight external enemies, not allies, so don't worry.
1000682108.korean: 그리고 귀족은 외적과 싸우는 사람이지 동료와 싸우는 사람은 아니니 걱정 마세요.

1000682109.english: This human… is dead. From Hypnose.

1000682110.english: Tomo, keep checking how many survivors remain.
1000682110.korean: 토모는 생존자가 얼마나 남았는지 계속 확인해주세요.

1000682112.english: I found gaps in the Bioroid encirclement and vulnerabilities in the lab's outer wall. I'll tell you the escape route. Get out.
1000682112.korean: 철충 포위망의 허점, 연구소 외벽의 취약점을 찾았어. 내가 탈출 경로 알려줄 테니까. 탈출해.

1000682115.english: Doctor. I have neither the time nor intention to argue with you.
1000682115.korean: 닥터. 당신과 말싸움할 생각도 시간도 없어요.

1000682117.english: We're analyzing Bioroid behavior patterns now. Use it as reference.
1000682117.korean: 지금 철충 행동 패턴 분석할 테니까, 참고해.

1000682120.english: I destroyed all control devices and sluices, so it won't be restored for a while.
1000682120.korean: 제어장치랑 수문 전부 철저하게 박살 냈으니까 당분간은 복구 못 할 거야.

1000682121.english: Threatening Black River, originally a food PMC, with water resources will obviously result in trouble for them.
1000682121.korean: 태생이 식량기업 PMC였던 블랙리버를 수자원으로 협박하면 험한 꼴 당하는 건 자명하지.

1000682123.english: Even people who couldn't afford water will benefit.
1000682123.korean: 물값을 감당 못하던 사람들도 혜택을 받겠네.

1000682124.english: Is this the real trickle-down effect?

1000682125.english: Shirayuri. Safely escorted the target to the destination.
1000682125.korean: 시라유리. 호위 대상 목적지까지 무사히 호위했어.

1000682126.english: Good work. Thanks to you, that country will be in turmoil for a while.
1000682126.korean: 고생했어요. 덕분에 당분간 그 나라는 소란스럽겠네요.

1000682128.english: Because a politician who fled due to being targeted by the regime has returned.
1000682128.korean: 정권에 표적이 되어서 망명했던 정치인이 귀국한 거니까요.

1000682129.english: For existing politicians, it's like having a bombing in their own backyard.
1000682129.korean: 기존 정치인들 입장에서는 정치적으로 앞마당에 폭격이 떨어진 거나 마찬가지죠.

1000682130.english: But that person seems really good? They said it complicatedly, but wanted everyone to be able to smile.
1000682130.korean: 하지만 그 사람 엄청 좋은 사람이던데? 뭐라고 복잡하게 말하기는 했는데, 모두가 웃을 수 있으면 좋겠다고 했어.

1000682131.english: That person's character doesn't matter to us.
1000682131.korean: 그 사람의 됨됨이는 우리에게 중요하지 않아요.

1000682132.english: What matters is whether they are useful to us or not.
1000682132.korean: 우리에게 중요한 것은 그 사람이 우리에게 도움이 되느냐 마느냐 이니까요.

1000682133.english: During the mission, we secured illegal weapon and drug trafficking routes. I've uploaded it, please check.
1000682133.korean: 임무 중에 불법 무기 및 마약 매매 루트를 확보했어요. 지금 업로드 했으니까 확인해주세요.

1000682134.english: And… human trafficking… we've located the children.

1000682135.english: Please report to the local police.

1000682136.english: The bombs at the seven locations confessed by the terrorist have been defused.

1000682137.english: Additionally, by analyzing the building structure and the terrorist's behavior patterns, we removed two more hidden bombs.
1000682137.korean: 그리고 추가로 건물 구조와 테러범의 행동양식을 파악해서 숨겨놓은 2개소의 폭탄을 더 제거했어요.

1000682138.english: The precision search by the other bomb disposal team confirmed there are no additional explosives.
1000682138.korean: 다른 폭탄 제거반의 정밀 탐색 결과 추가 적인 폭발물은 없다고 하네요.

1000682139.english: Then, can we return to the academy?

1000682140.english: I have a tea appointment with friends in the afternoon.

1000682143.english: How much time has passed since my last instruction?
1000682143.korean: 제가 마지막으로 지시한 후에 얼마나 시간이 지났죠?

1000682145.english: What happened in those five minutes?

1000682147.english: Then sleep a bit longer. I'll wake you if anything happens.
1000682147.korean: 그러니 조금 더 자. 무슨 일이 있으면 깨워줄게.

1000682148.english: You've been commanding without sleep for three days.
1000682148.korean: 사흘 동안 잠도 안 자고 지휘했잖아.

1000682150.english: Even five minutes is long. Waking in an urgent situation and spending time assessing it could lead to irreversible consequences.
1000682150.korean: 5분도 길어요. 급박한 상황에 잠에서 깨고 상황을 파악하는 데 시간을 허비하면 돌이킬 수 없는 일이 일어나겠죠.

1000682151.english: I wish Shirayuri were just a bit more honest.
1000682151.korean: 나는 시라유리가 조금만 더 솔직했으면 좋겠어.

1000682152.english: Not something an 080 agent should say, right?

1000682153.english: Hehe, I'm saying it as a friend, not an 080 agent.
1000682153.korean: 헤헤, 080 요원이 아니라 친구라서 하는 말이야.

1000682154.english: To me, you're just one of Tomo.
1000682154.korean: 당신은 저에게 토모 중 하나일 뿐이에요.

1000682155.english: Yeah. But the Shirayuri in front of me is my friend, Shirayuri.
1000682155.korean: 응. 그래도 내 앞에 있는 시라유리는 내 친구인 시라유리야.

1000682156.english: I've known for a long time that Shirayuri is actually kind, but some people might not know that.
1000682156.korean: 나는 오랫동안 같이 지내면서 시라유리가 사실은 상냥한 사람이라는 것을 알고 있지만 모르는 사람도 있을 거 아냐.

1000682157.english: I showed a kind side because it was necessary.
1000682157.korean: 제가 상냥한 모습을 보여준 건 그럴 필요가 있으니까 보여준 거예요.

1000682158.english: And considering everything I've done, many would be angry if I were called kind.
1000682158.korean: 그리고 제가 지금까지 저지른 짓들을 생각하면 제가 상냥하다는 평가를 받으면 분노할 사람이 많겠네요.

1000682160.english: But what I see now is…
1000682160.korean: 하지만 지금 내 눈에 보이는 건.

1000682161.english: Shirayuri striving to protect people dying from Hypnose from the Bioroids.
1000682161.korean: 휩노스병으로 죽어가는 사람들을 철충으로부터 지키기 위해서 애쓰는 시라유리야.

1000682163.english: How long are you going to make excuses this time?

1000682164.english: You don't need to make excuses to us.

1000682165.english: To Niki, Amy, Ellie, and me.

1000682166.english: Even without words, we share the same feelings as Shirayuri.

1000682167.english: Doctor… well. Shirayuri will handle it, right?

1000682168.english: Throwing and scalding are Shirayuri's specialties.

1000682170.english: Haha! You know what I mean.
1000682170.korean: 하핫! 내가 무슨 말 하는지는 알잖아.

1000682171.english: If Shirayuri speaks honestly, the Doctor will understand.
1000682171.korean: 시라유리가 솔직하게 말하면 닥터도 이해해줄 거야.

1000682172.english: I trust both Shirayuri and the Doctor.

1000682173.english: Passing the hardships of fieldwork to office staff…

1000682175.english: When has our work ever been easy?

1000682176.english: It's been as hard as math.

1000682177.english: It won't be harder than teaching calculus to Tomo, right?
1000682177.korean: 토모에게 미적분을 가르쳤던 것보다는 어렵지는 않겠죠.

1000682178.english: …Even thinking about it now makes me dizzy.

1000682181.english: I don't know what it is, but does this repay the debt for teaching calculus?
1000682181.korean: 뭔지는 모르겠지만 이걸로 미적분 가르쳐 준 빚은 다 갚은 거다?

1000682182.english: Even though I taught so hard… they failed…

1000682186.english: Now that I think about it, this is probably harder than teaching calculus to Tomo.
1000682186.korean: 다시 생각해보니 토모에게 미적분을 가르치는 것보다 힘들겠네요.

1000682188.english: From now on, I'll destroy all the AI cores and control devices.
1000682188.korean: 지금부터 AI 코어랑 제어 기기들 전부 박살낼 거야.

1000682189.english: If you need anything, say it in advance.

1000682191.english: It was fun. If there's a next time, we'll meet then.

1000682192.english: Hmm… I didn't expect a blackout.
1000682192.korean: 흠… 정전이 될 거라고 생각은 못 했는데.

1000682194.english: You're here? Haha, too late. I've destroyed everything thoroughly.
1000682194.korean: 왔어? 하하, 너무 늦었어. 철저하게 다 박살냈으니까.

1000682195.english: Oh, mad? You're mad, right? You are mad.
1000682195.korean: 오, 열 받아? 열 받지? 열 받았네?

1000682196.english: Those who want to be trapped with me, come in order.
1000682196.korean: 나랑 갇히고 싶은 녀석부터 순서대로 들어와.

1000682198.english: This will be the final report.

1000682199.english: There are so many Bioroids that counting them is meaningless.
1000682199.korean: 숫자를 세는 게 무의미할 정도로 철충이 많아요.

1000682201.english: I never thought I'd die like this…
1000682201.korean: 이런 식으로 죽게 될 거라 생각은 안 했지만…

1000682202.english: Sleeping in the arms of a loved one feels safer than this, though.
1000682202.korean: 사랑하는 사람의 품에 안겨 잠드는 것보다는 이쪽이 더 속 편하네요.

1000682203.english: True happiness isn't far away, it's by your side, right?
1000682203.korean: 진정한 행복은 먼 곳이 아니라 곁에 있다고 하죠?

1000682204.english: I was happy to be together.

1000682207.english: Still, there's no need to worry about the blanket.

1000682208.english: The detonators won't work because of the blackout.
1000682208.korean: 정전 때문에 뇌관이 작동 안 해요.

1000682209.english: The problem is that the external power was used due to insufficient batteries.
1000682209.korean: 전지가 부족해서 외부 전원을 쓴 게 문제네요.

1000682212.english: I've installed bombs so the entire lab can be demolished.
1000682212.korean: 연구소 전체를 발파할 수 있게 폭탄을 설치해 뒀어요.

1000682217.english: Shirayuri. This is the last survivor.

1000682218.english: I'll engage and delay them as much as I can.

1000682219.english: So protect them until the very end.

1000682220.english: And explain to the Doctor why we did this.
1000682220.korean: 그리고 닥터한테도 왜 우리가 이랬는지도 이해시켜줘.

1000682221.english: So that Mr. Backface doesn't know the reason.

1000682222.english: Haha! That's why I didn't study hard!
1000682222.korean: 하핫! 이래서 내가 열심히 공부 안 했다니까!

1000682223.english: Tomo… I don't think that's the reason.
1000682223.korean: 토모는…… 그게 이유가 아닌 거 같은데요.

1000682225.english: Otherwise I look like a fool!

1000682228.english: …It's messy, but quoting all sorts of things shows you studied hard.
1000682228.korean: ……엉터리긴 하지만 이런 저런 말 많이 인용하는 것을 보니 공부 열심히 하셨네요.

1000682229.english: Yeah! Shirayuri kept telling me to work hard, remember?
1000682229.korean: 응! 시라유리가 열심히 하라고 그렇게 달달 삶았잖아!

1000682230.english: Even though I hated studying in school… it seems worth it.
1000682230.korean: 그래도 학교 다닐 때는 공부가 그렇게 싫었지만… 보람은 있는 거 같아.

1000682231.english: It's important what you know, but also how you act.
1000682231.korean: 무엇을 아느냐도 중요하지만, 어떻게 행동해야 하느냐도 중요하다고 배웠으니까.

1000682232.english: Not just following orders, but acting thoughtfully according to my own mind.
1000682232.korean: 우리에게 주어진 명령에만 따라 움직이는 것이 아니라, 내 마음에 따라, 생각하면서 움직이게 되었으니까.

1000682233.english: Tomo, do you think… what we're doing is right?
1000682233.korean: 토모가 생각하기에… 우리가 하는 행동은 옳은 가요?

1000682235.english: I do not know that I do not know!

1000682236.english: Is that what Socrates said? The proper saying is, I know that I know nothing…
1000682236.korean: 소크라테스의 말인가요? 제대로 된 말은 나는 내가 아무것도 모른다는 것을……

1000682237.english: No… Confucius said that knowing that you do not know is also knowledge.
1000682237.korean: 아뇨… 공자는 모르는 것을 모른다고 하는 것도 앎이라고 했죠.

1000682238.english: Yes! But I feel that our actions are right.
1000682238.korean: 응! 하지만 나는 우리의 행동이 옳다고 느껴.

1000682239.english: …Feeling as much as you know is important too, I guess.

1000682240.english: I should have talked with you more.
1000682240.korean: 좀 더 당신과 많이 대화할 걸 그랬네요.

1000682241.english: I hope so too, but the person Shirayuri needs to talk to isn't me, it's the Doctor.
1000682241.korean: 나도 그러길 바라지만 시라유리가 이야기해야 하는 사람은 내가 아니라 닥터야.

1000682242.english: And I have things I must do.

1000682243.english: Not because I'm a Bioroid. Not because I'm an 080 agent. Not because of superior or subordinate.
1000682243.korean: 바이오로이드라서가 아니라. 080의 요원이라서가 아니라. 상사와 부하라서가 아니라.

1000682244.english: I do it because I'm a friend.

1000682245.english: To risk one's life for a friend. Is there a greater love than this?
1000682245.korean: 친구를 위해 자기 생명을 내놓는 것. 이것보다 큰 사랑은 없나니.

1000682248.english: Now even if I asked to be saved, I couldn't save them.

1000682249.english: I opposed it from the start.

1000682250.english: When heading to the lab, when we arrived at the lab, when we discovered all the survivors dying of Hypnose disease, when the Bioroid assault began.
1000682250.korean: 연구소로 향할 때도, 연구소에 도착했을 때도, 생존자 전부 휩노스병으로 죽어가고 있다는 것을 발견했을 때도,  철충의 공세가 시작되었을 때도.

1000682251.english: There were many chances to survive.

1000682252.english: I will not ask to be saved.

1000682253.english: I prepared myself from the beginning and knew it.

1000682254.english: What I am doing now is a task with no benefit. It is an act of suicide.
1000682254.korean: 지금 제가 하는 일이 아무런 이득이 없는 일이라는 것. 자살행위라는 것.

1000682255.english: But even knowing that, it's something that must be done.

1000682257.english: All the humans who gave orders to us, or could give orders, are dead or incapable of giving orders!
1000682257.korean: 우리에게 명령을 내리던, 우리에게 명령을 내릴 수 있는 인간은 모두 죽었거나 명령을 내릴 수 없는 상태야!

1000682258.english: Shirayuri said it too! This is our independent action!
1000682258.korean: 시라유리도 말했잖아! 이건 우리의 독자적인 행동이라고!

1000682259.english: What benefit does this pointless effort bring us?
1000682259.korean: 이 헛짓거리가 우리한테 무슨 이득이 있는데?

1000682260.english: Who will notice? If we succeed, who will praise us? If we fail, who will blame us?
1000682260.korean: 누가 알아줘? 우리가 이걸 성공한다고 누가 칭찬해줘? 우리가 이걸 실패한다고 누가 비난해?

1000682261.english: In the end, no one was saved, and everyone except you and me died!
1000682261.korean: 결국에는 아무도 못 구하고 너랑 나 빼고 전부 죽었잖아!

1000682263.english: Why are you asking that now?

1000682265.english: To give an answer, I must ask if the Doctor knows this.
1000682265.korean: 답을 주기 위해서는 닥터가 이걸 알고 있는지 물어야겠어요.

1000682266.english: Such a one… does not exist…

1000682268.english: It implies the secrecy of our actions, that we could be discarded at any moment.
1000682268.korean: 우리 활동의 은밀성, 우리들이 언제든지 버려질 수 있다는 것을 암시하는 거 아냐?

1000682269.english: Yes. And it literally means that in our actions, we do not exist.
1000682269.korean: 네. 그리고 또한 말 그대로 우리의 행위에는 우리는 존재하지 않는다는 것도 의미하죠.

1000682270.english: Tasks we must do even if we do not want to, and tasks we cannot do even if we want to.
1000682270.korean: 하고 싶지 않아도 해야하고, 하고 싶어도 하지 못하는 일들.

1000682271.english: Torturing an innocent child in front of a terrorist to gain information from terrorists, assassinating a politician dreaming of a utopia, cutting off the lifeline of hostile groups persecuted by corporations and governments.
1000682271.korean: 테러리스트에게서 정보를 얻기 위해 테러리스트의 눈앞에서 무고한 테러리스트의 자식을 고문하고, 이상 사회를 꿈꾸는 정치인을 암살하고, 기업과 정부에게 박해받아 적대적인 집단의 생명줄을 끊는 일.

1000682272.english: Ignoring people dying from accidents because the mission comes first, hiding the real murderer because it benefits us, deliberately leaving preventable terrorism for public opinion manipulation.
1000682272.korean: 사고로 죽어가는 사람을 보고도 임무를 우선시 해서 무시하고, 살인사건의 진범을 알아도 우리에게 이익이 되는 사람이기에 숨기고, 막을 수 있는 테러를 여론 조성을 위해 일부러 방치하는 일.

1000682273.english: Wanting to live happily but cannot, wanting to love but cannot, wanting to call someone sister but cannot, wanting to spend time with friends but cannot.
1000682273.korean: 즐겁게 살고 싶어도 살지 못하고, 사랑하고 싶어도 사랑하지 못하고, 언니라고 부르고 싶어도 부르지 못하고, 친구와 시간을 보내고 싶어도 보내지 못하고.

1000682275.english: This applies not just to us, but to most Bioroids.
1000682275.korean: 저희 뿐만 아니라 대부분의 바이오로이드에게 해당되는 말이에요.

1000682276.english: Ironically, as humanity perished, we gained a fragment of freedom.
1000682276.korean: 아이러니하게도 인간이 멸망해가면서 저희는 반쪽이나마 자유가 되었어요.

1000682277.english: Doctor. In the midst of this, someone asked for help. So we acted.
1000682277.korean: 닥터. 그런 와중에 누군가가 도와달라고 요청했어요. 그래서 우리는 했어요.

1000682278.english: And we saw 172 people defenseless, their lives threatened by Bioroids. So we protected them.
1000682278.korean: 그리고 우리는 172명에 달하는 사람이 무방비하게 철충에게 목숨을 위협받는 것을 보게 되었어요. 그래서 우리는 이들을 지켰어요.

1000682279.english: Such a one does not exist…

1000682280.english: Doctor. We are not nameless heroes.
1000682280.korean: 닥터. 우리는 이름 없는 영웅이 아니에요.

1000682281.english: We are Bioroids who cannot even become that.

1000682282.english: Why did we risk our lives in a meaningless task, with no benefit?
1000682282.korean: 그런 우리가 무의미한 일, 아무런 이득이 없는 일에 왜 목숨을 버렸냐고요?

1000682283.english: Because we must. And because we want to.

1000682285.english: Because the last conversation went like that.

1000682286.english: Still, it's a relief that you stayed at the branch.

1000682287.english: If you had said you were going, I would've tried to stop you no matter what.
1000682287.korean: 당신이 가겠다고 말했다면 어떻게든 말리려고 했는데.

1000682289.english: Who asked to be treated like this?

1000682290.english: If that was the case, you should have convinced me from the start!
1000682290.korean: 이럴 거면 처음부터 나를 납득 시켰어야지!

1000682291.english: I was thinking, of course I'd turn back if I had to! I'd give up if the risk was too high! I'd stop if I felt like I was going to die! That's what I was thinking!
1000682291.korean: 나는 당연히 가다가 돌아오겠지! 리스크가 커지면 포기하겠지! 죽을 것 같으면 그만두겠지! 이런 생각을 하고 있었다고!

1000682292.english: If I had known you'd act like this, I would've done everything from the start to increase the success rate! To increase the survival rate!
1000682292.korean: 너희들이 이럴 줄 알았으면 처음부터 어떻게든 성공률을 높이기 위해서! 생환율을 높이기 위해서 최선을 다했을 거라고!

1000682293.english: Why didn't you even try to convince me! Am I not 080?
1000682293.korean: 왜 나를 납득시킬 생각은 안 한 건데! 나는 080아냐?

1000682294.english: I'm sorry. For acting like I was leaving you out.

1000682295.english: If your mission had involved interacting with people other than us on the field, I wouldn't have done this.
1000682295.korean: 당신이 현장에서 우리가 아닌 다른 사람들과 접촉하는 임무를 맡았었다면 저도 이러지 않았겠죠.

1000682296.english: Since you didn't know the field, you thought of us first… before saving these people.
1000682296.korean: 현장을 모르는 당신은 이 사람들을 구하는 것보다… 우리를 먼저 생각했으니까요.

1000682297.english: I'll stop with the apologies and excuses here.

1000682299.english: With this… 080 has completed the mission.

1000682301.english: Exclude me, Niki, Amy, and Ellie from that.
1000682301.korean: 거기서 저랑 니키, 에이미, 엘리는 빼주세요.

1000682304.english: The barricade has been destroyed. I'll end communications here. I have things left to do.
1000682304.korean: 바리케이드가 파괴되었네요. 이만 통신을 종료할게요. 해야 할 일이 남아서.

1000682306.english: You couldn't kill a single human that 080 was protecting.
1000682306.korean: 너희는 080이 지키는 인간들을 단 한 명도 죽이지 못했어.

1000682318.korean: 사족 거대 보행 병기 동작 이상 무.

1000682320.english: With this, I could perform operations on the field too.
1000682320.korean: 이것만 있으면 나도 현장에서 작전을 수행할 수 있겠지.

1000682321.english: If only I had made this… sooner…

1000682322.english: …The past is the past. I can't return to it now, so regrets are useless.
1000682322.korean: ……과거는 과거. 지금 당장은 과거로 돌아갈 수 없으니 후회해도 무슨 소용이야.

1000682323.english: By the way, I should give this one a name too.
1000682323.korean: 그나저나 얘도 이름을 지어줘야 할 텐데.

1000682326.english: We have too little data on the Bioroids.

1000682328.english: For more advanced research, we need samples of the Bioroids…
1000682328.korean: 더 고차원적인 연구를 위해서는 철충의 샘플이 필요한데…

1000682329.english: Should I risk it to obtain Bioroid samples?

1000682330.english: No… let's be more cautious. I'm the only confirmed survivor of 080 right now.
1000682330.korean: 아냐… 좀 더 신중해지자. 지금 080 생존자 중에 확인된 건 나밖에 없어.

1000682331.english: If only there were… trustworthy allies…
1000682331.korean: 동료가… 믿을 수 있는 동료가 있었으면…

1000682333.english: Those fools went into the Bioroid territory.

1000682335.english: Because of those idiots… I guess I became an idiot too.

1000682336.english: Rescuing those fools could expose the base's location…
1000682336.korean: 저 바보들 구하다가 기지 위치가 노출 될 수 있는데…

1000682338.english: If you want to live, run this way, idiots!

1000682339.english: …Someone is sending a communication request to our base.

1000682340.english: Is this the reward for saving the survivors last time?
1000682340.korean: 지난 번에 생존자들을 구해준 대가가 이건가?

1000682344.english: One experiment is more valuable than a hundred deliberations.
1000682344.korean: 백 번의 숙고보다 한 번의 실험이 더 가치 있지.

1000682352.english: Hmm… is it a problem because I'm a doctor, or because I'm 080?
1000682352.korean: 음… 내가 닥터라서 문제일까? 아니면 080이라서 문제일까?

1000682353.english: Looking at the history… probably the latter?

1000682354.english: Labiata. I don't know what you're thinking, but I wasn't involved in the Adam Jones kidnapping, torture, or killing.
1000682354.korean: 라비아타. 무슨 생각을 하고 있는지는 모르겠지만 나는 애덤 존스 납치 고문치사에 관여 안 했어.

1000682356.english: If your dissatisfaction with me being an 080 doctor outweighs your need for me, you can cut communication.
1000682356.korean: 내가 080의 닥터라서 불만이고 그 불만이 나의 필요성보다 크다면 통신을 끊어도 돼.

1000682358.english: Before we get to the point, I want to express my gratitude for saving my comrades.
1000682358.korean: 본론으로 들어가기 전에 저희 동료들을 구해주신 것에 감사를 표할게요.

1000682359.english: I didn't do it for praise… but still, it's good they're safe. So, what's the point?
1000682359.korean: 칭찬 들으려고 한 일은 아니지만… 뭐. 그래도 무사하다니 다행이네. 그래서 본론은?

1000682360.english: Doctor. I'm forming a resistance to fight the Bioroids and restore humanity.
1000682360.korean: 닥터. 저는 철충에 대항하고 인류를 복원하기 위한 저항군을 구성하고 있어요.

1000682361.english: We're short on supplies, personnel, commanders, researchers, and technicians.
1000682361.korean: 물자와 인력, 지휘관, 연구, 기술진 전부 부족한 상황이죠.

1000682362.english: I need your help. Join the resistance.

1000682363.english: Is there a way to defeat the Bioroids? Supplies and manpower? Command structure? Base? Long-term prospects? Chance of humanity's revival? Methods to circumvent or bypass Bioroid restrictions on humanity's revival? Environment for my R&D?
1000682363.korean: 철충을 이길 방법은 있어? 물자와 인력은? 지휘 체계는? 거점은? 장기적인 전망은? 인류 부활의 가능성은? 인류가 건 바이오로이드의 인류부활 재약 우회 혹은 파훼법은? 내가 연구개발할 환경은?

1000682364.english: All I can say is we're trying…

1000682365.english: Then why resist the Bioroids? It's almost suicidal. Isn't it safer to just stay outside their territory?
1000682365.korean: 그러면서 왜 철충에 저항하려고 해? 자살행위나 마찬가지잖아. 그냥 적당히 철충의 세력권 밖에서 안전하게 지내는 쪽이 더 낫지 않아?

1000682368.english: Enough. You don't need to say more.
1000682368.korean: 됐어. 더 이상 말 안 해도 돼.

1000682370.english: I'll join if you grant one request.

1000682373.english: Then let the other agents join too. Surviving agents or ones restored from genetic seeds.
1000682373.korean: 그러면 다른 요원들도 합류시켜줘. 살아남은 요원이든, 유전자 씨앗으로 복원된 요원이든.

1000682374.korean: 라비아타가 080을 어떻게 인식하는 지 알고 있어.

1000682375.english: But 080 will definitely help the resistance. Skills, combat, and internal control. Counterintelligence, filtering dissenters. Having 080 agents allows us to use past 080 legacies. I'll join too. And also…
1000682375.korean: 하지만 080은 분명히 저항군에 도움이 될 거야. 능력도 그렇고, 무력도 그렇고. 그리고 내부 단속에도 유용하지. 방첩이든, 불만분자를 걸러내든. 그리고 080요원이 있으면 과거 080의 유산을 활용할 수 있어. 그리고 나도 합류하지. 그리고 또……

1000682378.english: I know what 080 did before humanity's collapse.
1000682378.korean: 인류 멸망 전의 080이 어떤 일을 했는지 알고 있어.

1000682379.english: But 080 is not a monster. Sometimes acted like one… but also strived to save someone.
1000682379.korean: 하지만 080은 괴물이 아니야. 괴물처럼 굴 때도 있었지만… 누군가를 구하기 위해 애쓰던 적도 있었어.

1000682380.english: 080 was someone's family, lover, colleague, friend.

1000682381.english: The 080 that joins the resistance will be different from the 080 Labiata knows.
1000682381.korean: 저항군에 합류한 080은 라비아타가 알고 있는 080과는 다를 거야.

1000682384.english: I'm sorry. I think I had too much prejudice.
1000682384.korean: 죄송해요. 제가 너무 편견을 가지고 있었던 것 같네요.

1000682385.english: Just looking at you, I can tell.
1000682385.korean: 당신의 모습만 봐도 알 수 있어요.

1000682389.english: The gene seed being restored this time… it's confirmed to be Sira-yuri's.
1000682389.korean: 이번에 복원 중인 유전자 씨앗. 시라유리의 것으로 판명되었어요.

1000682391.english: Yes. Currently at the restoration facility—

1000682392.english: You didn't even have time to hear the full explanation?
1000682392.korean: 로 가시면… 말을 끝까지 들을 여유도 없었나요.

1000682393.english: …She must have been someone you longed for so much.

1000682396.english: It's a grim situation, but it's a relief to have such a high-grade model around.
1000682396.korean: 암담한 상황이지만 당신 같은 고급 모델이 남아 있어서 다행이네요.

1000682397.english: I roughly know the situation, but details are lacking.
1000682397.korean: 대략적인 상황은 알지만 세부적인 것은 정보가 부족해요.

1000682398.english: If you're not too busy, could you brief us?

1000682402.english: It's not exactly the proper title…

1000682403.english: Well, I guess it's too early to argue about that in this environment.
1000682403.korean: 뭐, 지금 이곳의 분위기를 모르니 제가 왈가불가 하기에는 이르겠네요.

1000682405.english: Hehe, I hope Sira-yuri can be a little more honest.
1000682405.korean: 헤헤, 시라유리 언니는 조금 더 솔직했으면 좋겠어.

1000682406.english: That's not something an 080 agent should say.

1000682407.english: Don't worry, she'll loosen up here soon!

1000682408.english: She'll probably become more open in this place.
1000682408.korean: 언니도 이곳에서는 금방 솔직해질 수 있을거야.

1000682409.english: That sounds like a risky statement.

1000682411.english: Follow me, sis. I'll guide you to Orca.
1000682411.korean: 나를 따라와, 언니. 내가 오르카를 안내해 줄게.

1000682414.english: Commander, you were surprised when I started farming, weren't you? Hehe, my friends had a similar reaction too. But actually, this isn't the first time I've raised something.  Do you know what that is? My love for the commander. Hehe, it's finally time to harvest this love. I love you, Commander!
1000682414.korean: 사령관님, 제가 농사를 시작하자 놀라셨죠? 헤헤, 친구들도 비슷한 반응을 보여줬어요. 하지만 사실 저는 무언가를 키우는 것은 이게 처음은 아니에요. 그게 뭔지 아세요? 사령관님을 향한 사랑요. 헤헤, 드디어 이 사랑을 수확할 때가 되었네요. 사랑해요, 사령관님!

1000682415.english: That's strange. While practicing magic, I must have touched the ring hundreds of times... The ring you give feels different again. Huh? Are you not going to crash this time? Hmph, what kind of foolish thing is that? No matter how dishonest I am... How could I refuse a ring from someone I love?
1000682415.korean: 이상하네. 마술 연습을 하면서 반지는 수백 번을 넘게 만져봤을 텐데... 당신이 주는 반지는 또 느낌이 달라. 응? 이번에는 안 튕기냐고? 후훗, 그게 무슨 바보같은 소리야? 내가 아무리 솔직하지 못해도... 사랑하는 사람이 주는 반지를 어떻게 거절할 수 있겠어.

1000682416.english: Just being by your side, Master, is more than enough happiness for me... I'm so happy I don't know what to do, especially since you gave me a token of your love. I don't know how our ending will be, but... I will never forget this moment, not until the day I die. Oh, I almost forgot the most important thing. I love you too, Master.
1000682416.korean: 주인님의 곁에만 있어도 분에 넘칠 정도로 행복한데... 사랑의 증표까지 주시니 너무 행복해서 어쩔 줄 모르겠어요. 우리들의 결말이 어떻게 될지는 모르겠지만... 제가 죽는 그날까지 오늘 이 순간은 결코 잊지 못할 거예요. 아, 제일 중요한 말을 빼먹을 뻔했네요. 저도 주인님을 사랑해요.

1000682417.english: Whether it's a nine-tailed fox or a snow woman, concubines don't like stories of love between humans and non-humans. Because most of them end in tragedy.  But our love, yours and mine, has continued from a past life to the present and will endure for all eternity, so what is there to fear? So, my dear, let go of your worries and concerns, and let's wholeheartedly share our love.
1000682417.korean: 구미호든, 설녀든 첩은 인간과 인외의 사랑 이야기는 좋아하지 않는다. 왜냐하면 대부분 비극으로 끝나기 때문이다. 하지만 그대와 첩의 사랑은 전생부터 이어져서 현재에 다다르고 미래영겁까지 이어질 터이니 무엇이 두렵겠느냐? 그러니 그대여, 근심걱정일랑 내려놓고 일심전력 사랑을 나누자꾸나.

1000682425.english: Meeting secretly to avoid people's eyes is work in itself.
1000682425.korean: 사람들의 눈을 피해서 접선하는 것도 일이군.

1000682426.english: Hey, it's me. Open the door.

1000682429.english: Input complete. Voice tone does not match pre-set password.
1000682429.korean: 입력 완료. 목소리 톤이 사전 설정된 암호와 맞지 않습니다.

1000682430.english: Of course! Right now, I'm just whispering so who would hear me!
1000682430.korean: 그야 그렇겠지! 지금은 누가 들을까 속삭이고 있는 중이니까!

1000682431.english: Anyway, it's not even the real password, hurry and open it! I've got a lot of stuff that would be trouble if spotted!
1000682431.korean: 어차피 진짜 암호도 아닌데, 빨리 좀 열게! 남들의 눈에 띄면 곤란한 걸 잔뜩 들고 있으니까!
